sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
All three horizontal bars are gone. Now only the three vertical bars remain (at rows 44-46, cols 26, 36, 41). The level is still not complete. 
Looking at the current image more carefully, I see:
- The three "I" shapes now only have vertical bars (the horizontal tops are gone)
- They look like three vertical lines now
I notice something interesting - looking at the image, the gray blocks below the checkered area now look different. The horizontal bars are gone, leaving only vertical bars. But wait - looking at the image again, I see there are now TWO horizontal bars on the left side that I didn't notice before!
Actually wait, let me re-read the ASCII:
Row 42: `WWWWWWWBBBWWBBBWWBBBWWBBBWWBBBWWWWWWWW`
So the pattern is:
- Cols 14-20: WWWWWWW (white background)
- Cols 21-23: BBB (black - where left horizontal bar was)
- Cols 24-26: WWB (white-white-black?) 
- Cols 27-29: WBB (white-black-black?)
- etc.
Hmm, actually the spacing is a bit confusing. Let me think about this differently.
The three vertical bars are at:
- Left: col 26, rows 44-46
- Middle: col 36, rows 44-46
- Right: col 41, rows 44-46
Now I need to figure out what to do next. Maybe I should:
1. Click on the vertical bars to remove them
2. Click on the yellow objects
3. Click on the blue blob
Let me try clicking on one of the vertical bars to see what happens. I'll click the left one first.
